name: ai-receptionist-pro
description: AI-powered business phone management platform with WebSocket, Authentication, and Comprehensive Logging

scripts.dev: echo "Please run 'cd frontend && npm run dev' and 'uvicorn app.main:app --reload' in backend directory in separate terminals"
scripts.build:backend: echo "Backend is Python, no npm build step required."
scripts.start: echo "Please run 'cd frontend && npm run start' and 'cd backend && npm run start' in separate terminals"
scripts.lint: echo "Please run 'cd frontend && npm run lint' and 'cd backend && npm run lint' in separate terminals"
scripts.install:all: echo "Please run 'cd frontend && npm install' and 'cd backend && npm install' in separate terminals"

author: AI Receptionist Team
